## takumi docs check

Validate that generated docs are up-to-date with source code

### Synopsis

Run docs generation into a temp directory and compare against existing docs.
Exits non-zero if any generated file differs from what's on disk.
Use in CI or pre-commit hooks to catch doc drift.

```
takumi docs check [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for check
```
